name: GCP Artifact Registry legacy image cleanup
__comment__: Delete old GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage / GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage nodes after the RepositoryImage/Image model is loaded. New ingests do not emit these labels.

statements.__comment__: Delete remaining pure legacy scoped container-image nodes.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryContainerImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryRepositoryImage AND NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: Delete remaining pure legacy platform-image nodes.
statements.query: MATCH (old:GCPArtifactRegistryPlatformImage) WHERE NOT old:GCPArtifactRegistryImage WITH old LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE old RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
